title: MLSysBook release artifact
description: Canonical shape of releases/<project>-<id>/release.json across all MLSysBook publishable artifacts. Tier A includes per-file hashes; Tier B does not.

release_schema_version.description: Version of THIS schema. Bumped when release.json shape changes.

tier.description: Adoption tier. A = citable (Merkle), B = lite (flat hash).

release_hash.description: Full hex digest binding the release to its input bytes.

schema_version.description: Project-internal schema version (e.g. vault question schema).

previous_release_id.description: Previous release_id of this project (for changelog continuity).

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA the release was built from.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of release artifact emission.

input_paths.description: Paths (relative to repo root) hashed to produce release_hash.

files.description: Tier A only: per-file hashes for partial verification.

description.description: One-line operator-supplied summary, mirrored from workflow input.
